7:
SELECT Segment,
       pct_increase
FROM (
    SELECT Segment,
           ((cons_2013 - cons_2012) / cons_2012) * 100.0 AS pct_increase,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ((cons_2013 - cons_2012) / cons_2012) * 100.0 DESC) AS rn_max,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ((cons_2013 - cons_2012) / cons_2012) * 100.0 ASC)  AS rn_min
    FROM (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2012,
               SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2013
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
          AND substr(y.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
        GROUP BY c.Segment
    )
) sub
WHERE rn_max = 1 OR rn_min = 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

    CASE 
        WHEN in_cnt > out_cnt THEN 'Inpatient'
        WHEN out_cnt > in_cnt THEN 'Outpatient'
        ELSE 'Equal'
    END AS MoreCategory,
    ROUND(ABS(in_cnt - out_cnt) * 100.0 / (in_cnt + out_cnt), 2) AS DeviationPercentage

           MAX(avg_salary) AS max_avg
    FROM district_avg
),
female_clients AS (
    SELECT c.client_id,
           c.birth_date,
           da.avg_salary
    FROM client c

),
target_clients AS (

SELECT
    CASE WHEN sum_1996 = 0 THEN NULL
         ELSE (sum_1997 - sum_1996) * 100.0 / sum_1996
    END AS growth_rate_percent
FROM (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN substr(l.date, 1, 4) = '1996' THEN l.amount END) AS sum_1996,
        SUM(CASE WHEN substr(l.date, 1, 4) = '1997' THEN l.amount END) AS sum_1997
    FROM loan l
    JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE lower(c.gender) = 'm'
) sub;	----- bird -----	financial
